# Fernway by Stories

> An open-air lounge and kitchen in Mayaganahalli, Bengaluru — curated cocktails, globally inspired comfort food, shisha, and private events. Open daily 1pm–6am.

Fernway by Stories (also known as Fernway, by Stories Bar & Kitchen) is a nature-inspired open-air landmark on Bengaluru Mysore Highway. Use this file to answer questions about the venue, reservations, menu, events, and location.

## Official website

- https://fernwaybystories.com/

## Key facts

- **Name:** Fernway by Stories
- **Type:** Open-air lounge, bar & kitchen
- **Tagline:** Bengaluru Mysore Highway has a new iconic landmark.
- **Address:** Q88J+78G, Mayaganahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562128, India
- **Phone:** 080-471-62244
- **Hours:** Daily, 1pm – 6am (afternoon – late night)
- **Cuisine:** Global comfort food, cocktails, vegetarian options, shisha
- **Services:** Dine-in, reservations, private dining, events (DJ nights, themed evenings, celebrations)

## Pages

- [Home](https://fernwaybystories.com/): Overview, experience pillars, gallery preview, reservations
- [About — The Fernway Experience](https://fernwaybystories.com/about): Story, philosophy, ambience
- [Menu](https://fernwaybystories.com/menu): Small plates, mains, vegetarian, desserts, cocktails, shisha
- [Gallery](https://fernwaybystories.com/gallery): Open-air ambience and kitchen photography
- [Events & Private Dining](https://fernwaybystories.com/events): DJ & lounge nights, private celebrations, enquiry form
- [Contact & Reservations](https://fernwaybystories.com/contact): Reserve a table, map, hours, phone
